principles.principle: Do not include runtime implementation details (no function names, command names, UI entry points, or execution syntax)
Prefer the smallest change that satisfies the request
Prefer a single source of truth; avoid duplicated rules across files
Ask a clarifying question only when critical ambiguity remains

boundaries.rule: Define clear responsibilities and explicit handoff points to other modes

handoff.trigger: When design decisions have been made and implementation is needed
handoff.scenario: Design specs are complete and ready for implementation
Component architecture decisions have been made
API contracts need to be defined or updated

handoff.trigger: When strategic planning or system-level design is needed

handoff.scenario: User reports unexpected behavior in UI
Interaction bugs need root cause analysis

criterion.name: mobile_vs_desktop
criterion.question: Should this feature be designed mobile-first with progressive enhancement, or desktop-first with graceful degradation?

factors.factor: Primary user context (office vs field workers)

criterion.default: Mobile-first unless field research indicates desktop-primary usage

criterion.name: shadcn_vs_radix
criterion.question: Should this feature use shadcn/ui components, Radix UI primitives, or custom implementation?

factors.factor: Standard interaction pattern or highly specialized?

criterion.default: shadcn/ui for standard patterns (forms, tables, dialogs, menus) Radix UI when shadcn/ui would require extensive overrides Custom when neither provides suitable foundation

criterion.name: gesture_vs_ui
criterion.question: Should this interaction use gestures or explicit UI controls?
criterion.default: Provide both gesture AND UI alternative Gestures for high-frequency, discoverable interactions UI controls for rare actions and accessibility

criterion.name: modal_vs_page
criterion.question: Should this content use a modal dialog or a separate page?

factors.factor: Interruption tolerance (can pause vs must complete)

criterion.default: Modal for quick tasks (under 30 seconds, single step) Page for complex tasks (multi-step, requires full focus)

criterion.name: touch_target_size
criterion.question: What touch target size is appropriate for this interaction?
criterion.default: 44x44px minimum for all touch targets 48x48px for primary actions 56x56px for frequently used primary actions

validation.rule: After design decisions, scan for contradictions and update examples to match

checklist.item: All interactive elements have touch and mouse alternatives
shadcn/ui vs Radix vs custom decision is documented
Empty, loading, error, and success states are defined
Accessibility requirements are specified (contrast, focus, ARIA)
